title: How to Create a Private Wedding Photo Gallery (Free, No App Needed)
description: Step by step — from picking the tool to downloading every photo after the wedding. No Google Photos drama, no lost files.
author: Guestcam Team
tldr: The best free option is Guestcam: create a gallery, get a QR code, guests scan and upload — all private, no app needed.

content.text: What makes a good wedding gallery?

items: No guest sign-up — every hurdle means fewer photos.
Full quality — print-ready, suitable for long-term storage.
One place — all photos in a single gallery, not 5 different chats.
Persistent — gallery lives at least a few months, doesn't get lost in chat history.

content.alt: Wedding reception under fairy lights at golden hour
content.caption: A private gallery preserves the atmosphere — no prying eyes.

rows: Guests need a Google account. Public link is a risk.
QR code, no app, full quality
Paid after the free plan (20 photos).

content.alt: QR code for a wedding gallery on an elegantly set table
content.caption: One code per table — guests scan and share within seconds.

content.text: How do I set up the gallery with Guestcam step by step?

items: Go to guestcam.si and click 'Create gallery' — no credit card.
Fill in the couple's names (e.g. 'Ana & Marko'), wedding date and location.
Optionally set a password for the gallery (recommended for maximum privacy).
The system auto-generates a unique URL and QR code.
Download the QR code as a PDF — with a design that matches your wedding.

content.text: How do I share the gallery with guests?

items: Print QR cards and place them on every table.
Add the QR code to the wedding folder or thank-you card you hand out.
Send the link to guests via WhatsApp or email (works without the QR too).

content.text: How do I download all the photos after the event?
In the admin panel click 'Download all (ZIP)'. All photos and videos download in a single folder at full quality — ready to back up on your computer or an external drive.

content.a: Yes. Without a password it's only reachable via the exact URL/QR — Google and other search engines can't index it. A password adds an extra layer.
Yes. As gallery admin you can delete any submission. In moderation mode, guests see only their own photos.

content.q: What if a guest uploads a video larger than 50 MB?
content.a: Plus and Premium support full-HD video. On the free plan videos are limited to 30 seconds / 50 MB.

content.q: How long do the photos stay?
content.a: Free: 30 days. Basic: 3 months. Plus and Premium: 1 year. You can download everything as a ZIP at any time.

content.q: Can I share the gallery on social media?
content.a: Technically yes, but we don't recommend it. The gallery is designed to be private — better to share only with guests.

coverAlt: Private wedding gallery with a romantic backdrop
